title: Show Star Preview Accounting for Hint Penalty
summary: Enhance star preview to visually show hint-penalty-blocked stars with strikethrough styling.

tasks.description: Show stars blocked by hint penalty with a strikethrough style (star-blocked class).
acceptance_criteria: Stars blocked by hint penalty show with strikethrough
No hints used = no blocked stars

testing_focus: Use hints then check star preview vs no-hint star preview
